query: What is NPGC?
answer: NPGC stands for National Post Graduate College, a premier educational institution located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India.

query: What is the full name of NPGC?
answer: The full name is National Post Graduate College.

query: When was National Post Graduate College established?
answer: National Post Graduate College was established in the year 1974.

query: Who founded NPGC?
answer: National Post Graduate College was established by the then Chief Minister of Uttar Pradesh, Late Chandra Bhanu Gupta.

query: Where is NPGC located?
answer: National Post Graduate College is located at 2, Rana Pratap Marg, Lucknow - 226001, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is situated close to the banks of river Gomti in the heart of the city.

query: What is the address of National Post Graduate College?
answer: 2, Rana Pratap Marg, Lucknow - 226001, Uttar Pradesh (India).

query: What is the motto of NPGC?
answer: The motto of the college is 'Maritum Ethicus', which means 'Merit with Ethics'.

query: What accreditation does NPGC hold?
answer: NPGC is accredited as a Grade 'A' College by NAAC (National Assessment and Accreditation Council) and is also recognized as a College with Potential for Excellence (CPE) by UGC. It also holds Autonomous Status.

query: Is NPGC an autonomous college?
answer: Yes, NPGC is an Autonomous college accredited by NAAC and has CPE (College with Potential for Excellence) status granted by UGC.

query: What is CPE status?
answer: CPE stands for College with Potential for Excellence. NPGC is the only college in Lucknow, among a city of 16 universities and more than 150 degree colleges, to hold this highest status along with Autonomous Status.

query: Has NPGC adopted NEP 2020?
answer: Yes, National P.G. College has adopted NEP-2020 and is now NEP Compliant.

query: What is the NAAC grade of NPGC?
answer: NPGC holds a Grade 'A' accreditation from NAAC.

query: Which university is NPGC affiliated to?
answer: NPGC is affiliated to the University of Lucknow.

query: What is the website of NPGC?
answer: The official website of NPGC is www.npgc.in

query: What faculties does NPGC offer?
answer: NPGC offers courses in Arts and Commerce faculties at both under-graduate and post-graduate levels, and under-graduate courses in Science and Computer faculties.

query: What is the phone number of NPGC?
answer: The phone number of National Post Graduate College is 0522 4021304.

query: What is the email address of NPGC?
answer: The email address of NPGC is support@npgc.in

query: What are the working hours of NPGC?
answer: The working hours are Monday to Saturday: 08:00 AM to 04:00 PM. The college is closed on Sundays.

query: What is the contact number of the Training and Placement Office?
answer: The Training and Placement Office can be contacted at 93355 19893.

query: What is the email for placements at NPGC?
answer: The placement email is placement@npgc.in and the contact number is 9335519893.

query: Where can I pay semester fees online?
answer: Even Semester Fees can be submitted online through npgcfees.in

query: What is the vision of NPGC?
answer: The vision of NPGC is based on the motto 'Maritum Ethicus' (merit with ethics). The college believes that merit without ethics turns a person into a wild beast. Merit and ethics are the two pillars upon which the academic programmes of the college rest.

query: What is the mission of NPGC?
answer: The mission of NPGC is focused on the overall development of individuals who can serve their organizations, society, and humanity at large with dedication. The college aims to provide an environment where students can flexibly develop their personality and acquire in-depth knowledge in their chosen discipline, transforming them into useful citizens of the world.

query: What values does NPGC promote among students?
answer: NPGC aims to instill a deep sense of ethics, discipline, dedication, and responsibility in students. It strives to create a society with love, freedom, liberty, justice, equality, and fraternity.

query: Who is the principal of NPGC?
answer: The principal of National Post Graduate College is Prof. Devendra Kumar Singh.

query: What is the name of the current principal of National Post Graduate College?
answer: Prof. Devendra Kumar Singh is the current Principal of National Post Graduate College.

query: What under-graduate courses are offered at NPGC?
answer: NPGC offers the following under-graduate courses: B.A., B.A.J.M.C., B.B.A., B.B.A. (Digital Business), B.C.A., B.Com., B.Com.-eCommerce, B.Com.-Honors, B.P.H. (Public Health), B.Sc. (Biology Group), B.Sc. (Mathematics Group), B.Voc. (Banking & Finance), B.Voc. (Hospital Management), B.Voc. (Hotel Management), B.Voc. (Medical Lab Technology), B.Voc. (Operation Theatre Technology), B.Voc. (Physiotherapy), and B.Voc. (Software Development & E-Governance).

query: Does NPGC offer BCA?
answer: Yes, NPGC offers B.C.A. (Bachelor of Computer Applications) with 120 total seats (all Self-Finance).

query: Does NPGC offer BBA?
answer: Yes, NPGC offers B.B.A. with 120 total seats (all Self-Finance) and also B.B.A. (Digital Business) with 60 seats.

query: Does NPGC offer B.Com?
answer: Yes, NPGC offers B.Com. with 550 total seats (220 Regular + 330 Self-Finance), B.Com.-eCommerce with 60 seats, and B.Com.-Honors with 120 seats.

query: Does NPGC offer B.Sc.?
answer: Yes, NPGC offers B.Sc. (Biology Group) with 120 seats and B.Sc. (Mathematics Group) with 240 seats, all Self-Finance.

query: Does NPGC offer B.A.?
answer: Yes, NPGC offers B.A. with a total of 440 seats — 320 Regular and 120 Self-Finance.

query: What are the B.Voc courses offered at NPGC?
answer: NPGC offers the following B.Voc. courses: Banking & Finance (100 seats), Hospital Management (50 seats), Hotel Management (50 seats), Medical Lab Technology (50 seats), Operation Theatre Technology (50 seats), Physiotherapy (50 seats), and Software Development & E-Governance (100 seats).

query: Does NPGC offer BAJMC?
answer: Yes, NPGC offers B.A.J.M.C. (Bachelor of Arts in Journalism & Mass Communication) with 60 seats (all Self-Finance).

query: What post-graduate courses are offered at NPGC?
answer: NPGC offers the following post-graduate courses: M.A. Anthropology (40 seats), M.A. Economics (60 seats), M.A. English (60 seats), M.A. Geography (60 seats), M.A. Political Science (60 seats), M.A. Psychology (40 seats), M.Com (80 seats), M.P.H. Public Health (40 seats), M.Sc. Chemistry (30 seats), M.Sc. Geoinformatics (60 seats), M.Voc. Banking Stock & Insurance (50 seats), and M.Voc. Software & E-Governance (50 seats).

query: Does NPGC offer M.Com?
answer: Yes, NPGC offers M.Com with 80 seats (all Self-Finance).

query: Does NPGC offer M.Sc.?
answer: Yes, NPGC offers M.Sc. in Chemistry (30 seats) and M.Sc. in Geoinformatics (60 seats), both Self-Finance.

query: Does NPGC offer M.A.?
answer: Yes, NPGC offers M.A. in Anthropology (40 seats), Economics (60 seats), English (60 seats), Geography (60 seats), Political Science (60 seats), and Psychology (40 seats).

query: Does NPGC offer Ph.D. programs?
answer: Yes, NPGC offers Ph.D. programs. Admissions are conducted through a Ph.D. Entrance Examination. Students must submit a Research Proposal and attend an Orientation Program upon admission.

query: What is DDUKK at NPGC?
answer: DDUKK stands for Deen Dayal Upadhyay Kaushal Kendra. It is a skill development centre at NPGC established with a special grant from UGC. It offers six programs including two one-year Community College programs and two degree and two PG programs, covering ICT, ITES, and Banking, Insurance and Financial Services.

query: What programs are offered under DDUKK?
answer: DDUKK at NPGC offers six programs: two one-year programs under Community College, and two degree and two post-graduate programs in areas including ICT, ITES, and Banking, Insurance and Financial Services.

query: How can I apply for admission at NPGC?
answer: You can apply online through the NPGC official website (www.npgc.in). Admissions are open for the Session 2026-27.

query: What is the admission process at NPGC?
answer: The admission process at NPGC involves reviewing the Information Bulletin, checking the Admission Schedule and Eligibility Criteria, following the Admission Procedure, and applying online through the official website.

query: How many seats are there in B.A. at NPGC?
answer: B.A. has a total of 440 seats — 320 Regular and 120 Self-Finance.

query: How many seats are there in B.Com at NPGC?
answer: B.Com has a total of 550 seats — 220 Regular and 330 Self-Finance.

query: What entrance exams are used for admission at NPGC?
answer: NPGC uses LUACCET-2025 (for B.Com and B.Sc.) and LUACMAT-2025 (for BBA, BCA, B.Com-Hons, BAJMC, B.Voc) for admissions.

query: Are admissions open for 2026-27 at NPGC?
answer: Yes, admissions are open for the Session 2026-27 at NPGC. Students can apply online through the official website.

query: What is the total seat count under LUACCET at NPGC?
answer: Under LUACCET-2025, total seats at National P.G. College are 910: B.Com (550), B.Sc. Mathematics (240), B.Sc. Biology (120).

query: What is the total seat count under LUACMAT at NPGC?
answer: Under LUACMAT-2025, total seats at National P.G. College are 680: BBA (120), BBA-DB (60), BCA (120), B.Com-H (120), BAJMC (60), B.Voc-B&F (100), B.Voc-SD&EG (100).

query: What facilities does the NPGC library offer?
answer: The NPGC Central Library offers: Conventional Section (Books, Journals, Periodicals), E-Research Section, E-Library with INFLIBNET access, Audio Visual study material, Research Section with Advanced Reference Books, Air-conditioned Reading Area, Toppers' answer copies and Previous Year Question Papers, Photocopying and Printout Section, Employment News and Competitive Study Material, and a Students Information Section.

query: How many books are in NPGC library?
answer: NPGC library holds 65,000+ print books (back volumes and thesis), 350 non-print materials (Microfiche, AV), 40,300 special collection items, and 8,000 reference books.

query: What is the total area of NPGC library?
answer: The total area of the NPGC library is 743.22 Sq. Mtr., with a lounge area of 500 Sq. ft. for browsing and relaxed reading.

query: What is the seating capacity of NPGC library?
answer: The total seating capacity of the library is 80, with 52 individual reading carrels.

query: What are the library working hours at NPGC?
answer: Library working hours: On Working Days – 8 hours; Before Examination Days – 8 hours; During Examination Days – 10 hours; During Vacations – 4 hours.

query: What are the rules for borrowing books from NPGC library?
answer: Key library rules: Each student is issued 6 books at a time for one semester (July-Dec and Jan-June). Books can be reissued twice more for 10 days each. Late return penalty is Re. 10/- per month. If a book is lost, replace it or pay three times the price. Magazines and periodicals are issued for one week. Reference books are not issued for home use except on days before holidays. Books can only be issued during the Library Period, not during teaching periods.

query: How many books can a student borrow from NPGC library?
answer: A student can borrow 6 books at a time for a period of one semester.

query: What is the penalty for late return of library books at NPGC?
answer: The penalty for late return of library books is Re. 10/- per month for all students.

query: What happens if a student loses a library book at NPGC?
answer: If a student loses a library book, they must either replace the book or deposit three times the price of the book in the library.

query: Does NPGC library have N-LIST access?
answer: Yes, NPGC library provides access to INFLIBNET (N-LIST) and a number of UGC e-Resources through the E-Library section.

query: Does NPGC have a hostel?
answer: Yes, NPGC has hostel facilities for both boys and girls. The girls' hostel has a capacity of 155 students and the boys' hostel has a capacity of 100 students.

query: What is the capacity of NPGC girls hostel?
answer: The girls' hostel at NPGC has a capacity of 155 students.

query: What is the capacity of NPGC boys hostel?
answer: The boys' hostel at NPGC has a capacity of 100 students.

query: What facilities are available in NPGC hostel?
answer: NPGC hostel facilities include: Internet access, Air-conditioned Rooms, Generator Sets, Photocopier Machine, Water Cooler with Purifier, Geysers, Meditation Rooms, Cultural Hall, Common Reading Area, Common Rooms with TVs (DTH), Gymnasium, Yoga Center, Badminton Court, Indoor Games, Mess, CCTV for security, Medical Facilities, and a Furnished Guest House for parents of inmates.

query: Is there a gym in NPGC hostel?
answer: Yes, the NPGC hostel has a Gymnasium and Yoga Center among its facilities.

query: Is there internet in NPGC hostel?
answer: Yes, NPGC hostel provides internet access to its residents.

query: Is there a mess facility in NPGC hostel?
answer: Yes, the NPGC hostel has a mess facility for its residents.

query: Does NPGC have a canteen?
answer: Yes, NPGC has a canteen in the college campus that caters to the nutritional needs of students and teachers in hygienic conditions at subsidized rates.

query: What food is available in NPGC canteen?
answer: The NPGC canteen menu offers a wide range of vegetarian North Indian, South Indian and Continental dishes, beverages, flavoured milk, Tea and Coffee.

query: Where is the NPGC canteen located?
answer: The canteen is situated within the college campus next to the car park. It is spacious, well-furnished, and has an intercom facility.

query: Is the NPGC canteen subsidized?
answer: Yes, the NPGC canteen provides food at subsidized rates in hygienic conditions.

query: What sports facilities does NPGC offer?
answer: NPGC has a dedicated Sports and Physical Education department. It offers training in Chess, Table Tennis, Lawn Tennis, Badminton, Athletics, and Cricket. The college organizes inter-degree collegiate tournaments and annual athletic meets. Special self-defence training is provided for girls.

query: What cricket tournaments does NPGC organize?
answer: NPGC organizes the Chandra Bhanu Gupta Inter Degree Collegiate Cricket Tournament and the Amit Singh Trophy, now in its 20th edition.

query: Does NPGC offer self-defence training?
answer: Yes, special self-defence training is provided to girls students at NPGC.

query: Does NPGC have NCC?
answer: Yes, NPGC has a National Cadet Corps (NCC) unit. NCC is a voluntary Tri-Services Organization comprising the Army, Navy and Air Force. Cadets receive basic military training and have participated in Annual Training Camps, DG-organised camps, Trekking Expeditions, Boat Pulling, and Republic Day Camps.

query: Does NPGC have NSS?
answer: Yes, NPGC has three NSS (National Service Scheme) units — two units for Girls and one unit for Boys. Activities include National Harmony, village/slum adoption for cleanliness and literacy, Environmental Conservation, AIDS Awareness, Health and Immunization, Exhibition Organization, and Winter/Flood Relief.

query: How many NSS units are there in NPGC?
answer: There are three units of NSS in NPGC — two units for Girls and one unit for Boys.

query: Does NPGC have Scouts and Guides?
answer: Yes, NPGC has a Scouts and Guides unit. The college organizes the rally of Rovers and Rangers every year, promoting determination, service, and honour.

query: What magazine does NPGC publish?
answer: NPGC publishes 'Abhivyakti', an annual college magazine. It features original writings (poems, short stories, articles), photographs from sports and events, and extraordinary student achievements.

query: What is Abhivyakti?
answer: 'Abhivyakti' is the annual college magazine of NPGC, featuring original writings, photographs from sports and co-curricular events, and messages from the Principal and distinguished guests.

query: What is In-Sight at NPGC?
answer: 'In-Sight' is a publication of NPGC that focuses on special events, workshops, seminars of the month, and administrative and academic announcements of student interest.

query: Does NPGC have a journal?
answer: Yes, NPGC publishes the NPGC Journal. Departments and faculties also bring out e-Newsletters highlighting achievements, workshops, seminars, and employment and future prospects.

query: What is the Epoch Making Study Center at NPGC?
answer: The Epoch Making Study Center at NPGC provides scholarly research and advanced study facilities on Gandhi and Nehru. It regularly publishes monographs, research papers, leaflets, pamphlets, and souvenirs on special National and International Seminar occasions.

query: Does NPGC have a placement cell?
answer: Yes, NPGC has a Training and Placement Cell. It serves as a bridge between students' academic journey and the professional world, improving abilities and connecting students with top companies.

query: What is the contact of NPGC placement cell?
answer: The NPGC Training & Placement Cell can be contacted at 9335519893 or via email at placement@npgc.in

query: Who is the President of the Student Placement Committee at NPGC?
answer: Nishant Bajaj (B.Com. Hons.) is the President (Core) of the Student Placement Committee 2024-25.

query: Does NPGC have a distance learning centre?
answer: Yes, NPGC has a Distance Learning Centre serving as a Study Centre for IGNOU and UPRTOU, offering certificate, diploma, and degree programs in distance mode with regular consultation and remedial sessions.

query: Is NPGC an IGNOU study centre?
answer: Yes, NPGC is a Study Centre for IGNOU (Indira Gandhi National Open University), offering programs in distance mode with regular consultation classes and remedial sessions.

query: Is NPGC affiliated with UPRTOU?
answer: Yes, NPGC is a Study Centre for Uttar Pradesh Rajarshi Tandon Open University (UPRTOU), Allahabad, offering distance learning programs.

query: How can I check my result at NPGC?
answer: Results can be accessed through the Student Corner section on the NPGC official website (www.npgc.in).

query: How can I download my admit card for NPGC semester exam?
answer: Students can download their semester-end examination admit card from the Student Corner or Result section on the NPGC website.

query: Where can I find the examination datesheet for NPGC?
answer: The examination datesheet is available in the Student Corner section of the NPGC website under the Datesheet option.

query: Where can I find the syllabus at NPGC?
answer: The syllabus can be downloaded from the Student Corner section of the NPGC website.

query: Where can I find online study material for NPGC?
answer: Online Study Material is available in the Student Corner section of the NPGC website.

query: What student grievance mechanisms does NPGC have?
answer: NPGC has a Student Grievances portal where students can submit grievances online via the Student Grievance Form. The college also follows the POSH Act and has Anti-Ragging Regulations and an Anti-Ragging Portal.

query: Does NPGC have anti-ragging measures?
answer: Yes, NPGC has strict Anti-Ragging Regulations, an Anti-Ragging Portal, and follows all UGC guidelines to prevent ragging on campus.

query: Does NPGC have a counselling centre?
answer: Yes, NPGC has a Counselling Center run by the Psychology Department.

query: Does NPGC provide scholarships?
answer: Yes, NPGC has scholarship provisions for eligible students. The college regularly issues scholarship notices and correction notices. There is also a 'Nirdhan Chhattra Nidhi' (fund for poor students) available.

query: What is Nirdhan Chhattra Nidhi at NPGC?
answer: Nirdhan Chhattra Nidhi is a fund at NPGC meant to support financially underprivileged students in their education.

query: What infrastructure facilities does NPGC have?
answer: NPGC has well-equipped labs, a computerised library, e-library, data analysis centre, air-conditioned reading room, multimedia labs, BAJMC lab, computer labs, CCTV security, and a lush green campus near the banks of river Gomti.

query: Does NPGC have a medical facility?
answer: Yes, NPGC provides medical facilities for students on campus.

query: Does NPGC have facilities for differently-abled students?
answer: Yes, NPGC has a dedicated 'Unit for Differently Abled' to support students with disabilities.

query: Does NPGC have CCTV on campus?
answer: Yes, NPGC campus and hostels are equipped with CCTV cameras for security.

query: What recent events were organized at NPGC?
answer: Recent events at NPGC include: Ph.D. Orientation Programme (Dec 29, 2025), Educational Visit to C.B. Gupta Krishi Mahavidyalaya (Mar 11, 2025), World Wildlife Day (Mar 3, 2025), ATAL-FDP Faculty Development Program (Sep 30 – Oct 5, 2024), Alumni Meet 2024, Meraki - The Media Fest (Mar 2024), and TechFest 3.0.

query: What is MERAKI at NPGC?
answer: MERAKI is the Media Fest organized at NPGC for students interested in media and journalism.

query: What is TechFest at NPGC?
answer: TechFest (TechFest 3.0 being a recent edition) is a technology festival organized at NPGC for students.

query: Does NPGC organize alumni meets?
answer: Yes, NPGC organizes Alumni Meets regularly. The most recent Alumni Meet was in March 2024.

query: What is ATAL-FDP at NPGC?
answer: ATAL-FDP is the ATAL Faculty Development Program, a 6-day faculty development program organized at NPGC from September 30 to October 5, 2024.

query: Is NPGC recognized by UGC?
answer: Yes, NPGC is recognized by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and holds the prestigious College with Potential for Excellence (CPE) status.

query: Does NPGC support research?
answer: Yes, NPGC supports research through its Research Section in the library with Advanced Reference Books, a Data Analysis Centre, Research Publications, the Epoch Making Study Center, and Ph.D. programs across disciplines.

query: Does NPGC have an AgniVeer scheme?
answer: Yes, NPGC provides information on the AgniVeer Yojna scheme for interested students through its website.

query: What is Commercepedia at NPGC?
answer: Commercepedia is an educational resource available at NPGC, including a Student Edition, designed to support commerce students.

query: Does NPGC have a Right to Information mechanism?
answer: Yes, NPGC provides Right to Information (RTI) access as per government regulations, available through the official website.

query: What is the Language Exchange Program at NPGC?
answer: NPGC organized a Language Exchange Program with the London (UK) Hindi Samiti through the Department of English, promoting cultural and linguistic exchange.

query: Does NPGC have a Placement Brochure?
answer: Yes, NPGC has a Placement Brochure available, along with Placement Results for 2024-25 and 2023-24 published on the official website.

query: What is the Academic Calendar of NPGC?
answer: NPGC publishes an Academic Calendar each year. College Information & Academic Calendar for 2024-25 and 2025-26 are available on the official website.

query: How can students access UGC e-resources at NPGC?
answer: Students can access UGC e-resources through the Quick Links section on the NPGC website and through the E-Library section in the Central Library via INFLIBNET (N-LIST).

query: Does NPGC have a photo gallery?
answer: Yes, NPGC maintains a Photo Gallery on its website in the Media section, featuring photographs from events, programs, and activities.
